markers.title: Card bleed reads as layout bug
markers.body: Revenue data from card 2 is fully legible below card 1 — looks like clipped content, not a deliberate peek effect.

markers.title: No persistent tap affordance
markers.body: Dots are 5×5 px, near-invisible. After the entry nudge plays once, nothing signals the card is tappable on return visits.

markers.title: "View reservations" undersized
markers.body: Text-only link on the right edge — smallest, hardest-to-hit position one-handed. iOS HIG minimum is 44 dp tall.

markers.title: Inconsistent number formatting
markers.body: '09' (zero-padded) in the top row vs bare '0' in the bottom row — looks like two different data systems.

markers.title: Widget dates are stale
markers.body: Dynamic Pricing + Available Rooms show Apr 2026 dates. Will confuse users in testing — drive from today's date.

working_well: Stat hierarchy is clear — label above large number reads fast at a glance.
Salmon hero zone cleanly separates today context from below-the-fold.
Demand colour coding in the pricing grid is instantly scannable.
worth_considering: Add a '1 of 2' counter or chevron next to the dots for a persistent flip cue.
Clip the card container so card 2's content is masked until intentionally flipped.
